title: prestonia mollis
intro: Prestonia mollis, also known as "Honduran Trumpet Creeper" or "Prestonia," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and infections. The health benefits of Prestonia mollis include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. Prestonia mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
